response_text:
ENTITY Passenger
PK passenger_id
ATTR passenger_id : varchar : PK
ATTR given_name : varchar
ATTR family_name : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR departure_seat : varchar
ATTR arrival_baggage_belt : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK registration_code
ATTR registration_code : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR location_code : varchar
ATTR city : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_code
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR status_label : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatusEvent
PK event_id
ATTR event_id : varchar : PK
ATTR event_date : date
ATTR event_time : time
ATTR status_code : varchar : FK

REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_code
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=departure_airport_code
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=arrival_airport_code
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1 : FK=registration_code
REL Passenger -> Flight : 1 -> 1..N : FK=flight_id
REL FlightStatusEvent -> Flight : 1 -> 1..N : FK=flight_id
REL FlightStatusEvent -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1 : FK=status_code
REL FlightStatusEvent -> CrewMember : 1 -> 1..N : FK=crew_id
